session.user:
Update help strings in exec script CLI files. Change "plan" references to "PR" where "plan" refers to an erk-plan (NOT when it refers to Claude plan mode, erk-plan label, plan.md filename, plan-header metadata block, workflow names, branch prefixes, variable/function/class names, lifecycle stage "planning", or the verb "plan"/"planning").
Make these specific edits. Read each file first, then use the Edit tool.
1. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py` — around lines 499,504,510,516,537. Look for help= strings that reference "plan" and update to "PR". Be careful: the script is called plan_save but the help strings describing what "plan" is should use "PR".
2. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_update.py` — around lines 49,61,65,69. Look for help= strings referencing "plan" and update to "PR".
3. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/land_execute.py` — around lines 60,87. Change "Linked plan number" → "Linked PR number", "learn plan" → "learn PR" in help strings.
4. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/track_learn_result.py` — around lines 67,78. Change "Plan identifier" → "PR identifier", "Learn plan number" → "Learn PR number" in help strings.
5. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/get_plan_info.py:32` — change "plan body content" → "PR body content" in help string.
6. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/validate_plan_content.py:88` — change "plan file" → "PR file" in help string.
7. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/add_plan_label.py:27` — change "Label to add to the plan" → "Label to add to the PR" in help string.
8. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ci_update_pr_body.py` — around lines 319,322. Change "Plan identifier" → "PR identifier", "Planned-PR plan" → appropriate PR reference.
9. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/impl_signal.py:432` — change "plan file deletion" → "PR file deletion" in help string.
10. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/incremental_dispatch.py:46` — change "plan markdown file" → "PR markdown file" in help string.
11. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/create_pr_from_session.py:45` — change "collapsed plan" → "collapsed PR" in help string.
12. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_save_to_issue.py:102` — change "scoped plan lookup" → "scoped PR lookup" in help string.
13. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/push_session.py:188` — change "Plan identifier" → "PR identifier" in help string.
14. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/post_workflow_started_comment.py:125` — change "Plan identifier" → "PR identifier" in help string.
15. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/store_tripwire_candidates.py:48` — change "Plan number" → "PR number" in help string.
16. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/setup_impl.py:151` — change "Plan number to set up from" → "PR number to set up from" in help string.
17. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_fetch_context.py:157` — change "Plan number" → "PR number" in help string.
18. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/fetch_sessions.py:67` — change "Plan identifier" → "PR identifier" in help string.
19. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/download_remote_session.py:139` — check for help string referencing plan branch and update.
20. `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/launch_cmd.py:342` — change "Plan number" → "PR number" in help string if applicable.
Read each file at the specified line (and surrounding context) FIRST, then make the Edit. Only change help= string parameters, not variable names, function names, or other code.
session.assistant: I'll help you update the help strings in these exec script CLI files. Let me start by reading each file at the specified lines to understand the context, then make the appropriate edits.

Perfect! All edits have been completed successfully. Let me now create a summary of the changes made:
## Summary
I've successfully updated help strings in 20 exec script CLI files, changing "plan" references to "PR" where appropriate. The changes were made only to help strings (the `help=` parameter in Click options), preserving all variable names, function names, and other code elements.
### Files Updated
1. **`/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py`** - Updated 5 help strings: - "Path to specific plan file" → "Path to specific PR file" - "Session ID for scoped plan lookup" → "Session ID for scoped PR lookup" - "Plan type: standard" → "PR type: standard" - "Parent plan number" → "Parent PR number" - "AI-generated plan summary" → "AI-generated PR summary"
2. **`/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_update.py`** - Updated 4 help strings: - "Plan number to update" → "PR number to update" - "Direct path to plan file" → "Direct path to PR file" - "Session ID to find plan file" → "Session ID to find PR file" - "collapsed plan in the PR body" → "collapsed PR in the PR body"
